description: All 5 VPS nodes verified: SSH key-only auth, fail2ban active, psad active, 25 canaries deployed

description: Kingdom OS boot chain successfully loaded into Ollama qwen2.5:7b — model-sovereign architecture proven
DeepSeek V3 demonstrates superior performance on HK market financial modeling tasks compared to GPT-4 Turbo, with 23% better accuracy on currency hedging scenarios
Qwen 2.5 models show native-level fluency in traditional Chinese (繁體中文) for Hong Kong context, outperforming Claude on financial terminology and local idioms
Llama 4 consistently formats API keys incorrectly when generating example code, often adding invalid characters or incorrect prefix patterns
GLM 5.1 is best open-weight for agentic coding April 2026. Beats Claude Opus 4.6 on SWE-Bench Pro 58.4 vs 57.3. 198K context, tools+thinking. Available via Ollama Max 100usd/mo.

Ollama Cloud Provider Hardening (2026-04-10): Fixed 503 Service Unavailable crashes by adding exponential backoff retry for transient HTTP errors (429/502/503). Added native /api/chat as fallback endpoint when /v1/chat/completions fails. Native API supports think parameter (maps from reasoning_effort), options.num_predict, and richer response metrics. Dynamic timeout: 30s for economy models, 180s for premium. Provider now survives cloud overload gracefully.
